headline: Is U.S. Bancorp (USB) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is USB a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on U.S. Bancorp on Danny’s Substack by Danny Green. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on USB. U.S. Bancorp’s share was trading at $57.00 as of April 20th. USB’s trailing and forward P/E were 11.95 and 11.34 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. U.S. Bancorp, a […]
